name: Hex and Chill
short_description: A serene match-3 puzzle game designed for pure relaxation. Swap colorful hex tiles at your own pace with no timers or pressure—just soothing gameplay and tranquil music. Includes full source code for the curious. Your personal oasis of simple puzzles awaits.
detailed_description:
Hex & Chill is a minimalistic match-3 puzzle game designed with one purpose: pure relaxation. Swap and match colorful tiles across soothing hexagonal boards with no timers, no stress—just simple, satisfying puzzle gameplay at your own pace.

Take a deep breath, let the gentle melodies wash over you, and melt into a state of puzzle-solving Zen. Whether you're a casual player looking for a five-minute brain break or settling in for hours of peaceful gaming, Hex & Chill provides the perfect escape from life's chaos.

Key Features:

  • Simple & Accessible Gameplay - Designed for maximum relaxation with clean, intuitive controls. No complicated mechanics or frantic timers—just pure matching bliss that anyone can enjoy.

  • Gorgeous Themed Environments - Six distinct atmospheric settings: Nature, Air, Water, Earth, Fire, and Space, each with its own soothing color palette and tranquil soundtrack.

  • Grandma-Approved Design - Intentionally clean, calming, and approachable with large, distinct pieces and soothing colors that reduce eye strain. Perfect for players of all ages and experience levels.

  • Play Your Way - No timers, no daily tasks, no pressure. Unlock new backgrounds and music tracks as you progress, or stick with your favorites—it's entirely up to you.

  • Open Source Learning - Curious about how games work? Every purchase includes full access to the game's source code with detailed documentation. Examine the three core scripts that power the entire experience within RPG Maker MZ, learn how a complete match-3 game functions, or modify it to create your own custom version.

Whether you're here to unwind with soothing puzzles or interested in game development, Hex & Chill delivers both a peaceful gaming experience and an educational opportunity. Sometimes the simplest pleasures are the most satisfying—match some hexes, chill out, and feel your stress melt away.
